/CAL:FINAL SET OR DISPO/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/WS/WEAP/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE A CURFEW OF 8 PM TO 6 AM DAILY/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFEREENCE & STATUS OF CO-DEFENDANT/DOP/
